title: Sweden Individual Income Tax Return (Inkomstdeklaration 1, SKV 2000)
description: File Skatteverket (Swedish Tax Agency) Form SKV 2000, 'Inkomstdeklaration 1' ('Income Tax Return 1'), the annual individual income tax return covering the identifying taxpayer, employment income and deductions (sections 1-2), general deductions (section 3), the basis for common tax reductions (ROT/RUT work, renewable electricity, donations, sustainable-technology installation; section 4), the basis for the residential property charge and property tax (sections 5-6), capital income and deductions (sections 7-8), foreign insurance yield tax (section 9), additional disclosures (foreign income, foreign tax settlement, ROT/RUT reallocation requests, income-data corrections, free-text other information; section 17), and the signature/contact footer (section 18). This opens Sweden's Taxes vertical (4/6). Large parts of the return arrive pre-printed by Skatteverket from employer, bank, and other third-party reports; a filer verifies, corrects, and supplements those amounts rather than completing the form from a blank slate. It does not submit anything or imply government endorsement.

source.documentRef: Skatteverket's official bilingual 'Income Tax Return 1, 2026 (income year 2025)' page (SKV 2000, 'Inkomstdeklaration 1'), which publishes the exact Swedish box text and its own official English translation for every numbered box on the form ('Here you will find the headlines in the form "Inkomstdeklaration 1, 2026" ("Income Tax Return 1, 2026") in English'), cross-checked against the companion SKV 2000 order/distribution page and the e-service filing guide

verification.notes: GOV-2091 'GovSchema Standard Research' cycle. The task brief's named National ID candidates (DE Steuer-ID, SG NRIC loss/damage + re-registration, NZ RealMe, 'remaining voter registration') were re-checked first against CATALOG.md and confirmed already resolved or dead-ended in prior cycles (GOV-651, GOV-634/GOV-641, GOV-660, and the closed voter-registration backlog). Rather than re-attempt an already-closed gap, this cycle opened Sweden's Taxes vertical (Sweden already had 3/6: Business Formation GOV-2056, DMV GOV-2063, Visa GOV-2070). Screened Sweden's Passport (Polisen, in-person/eID-login 'Mina sidor' booking flow with no downloadable field-by-field form) and National ID card (Skatteverket id-kort, staff-assisted in-person application at a tax office, no pre-fillable form) candidates first and found both weak — no field-by-field source, identity verification and biometrics handled entirely in person. Chose SKV 2000 'Inkomstdeklaration 1' instead: unlike most of this registry's tax-return schemas, Sweden's individual return has no publicly downloadable blank specimen PDF at all (it is a personalized document Skatteverket pre-prints per taxpayer from third-party reports and mails to the registered address; a blank paper copy can only be ordered via an authenticated e-service from 2026-04-10, or printed after an eID login to 'Mina sidor'). Skatteverket instead maintains a dedicated, officially-translated 'contents of the income tax return' page that states verbatim it publishes 'the headlines in the form... in English', giving the exact Swedish box text and English translation for every numbered box (1.1 through 9.2, plus sections 17-18) — fetched directly and used as the primary field-by-field source in place of a specimen PDF render. Sections 10-16 (Business activities, Interest allocation, Expansion funds tax, Social security contribution reduction, General deductions for business, and the business-rental-property charge/tax bases) are deliberately not modelled: they apply only to filers who also run a sole-proprietorship business (referencing separate Forms NE/N3A) or own rental/industrial property, are a materially different and much larger scope than the core individual return, and each references further un-modelled annexes (K4 through K15A/B) the same way this registry already defers K-annex/NE/N3A detail for other jurisdictions' larger business-tax returns — consistent with the existing convention of deferring repeating/complex annex-referenced blocks rather than modelling them speculatively. The taxpayer identity header (personal identity number, name, address) is not itself enumerated on Skatteverket's own 'contents' page (which documents only the numbered income/deduction/disclosure boxes, not the administrative cover), and no blank specimen was available to visually confirm its exact layout; it is included here because every Swedish tax/population-registration document in this registry and Skatteverket's own general guidance confirm returns are personalized to a specific personnummer and mailed to the taxpayer's registered address — but this specific header's field layout is disclosed as not independently confirmed against the form itself (see VERIFICATION.md). Mock conformance test run: 0 errors across all fields (see VERIFICATION.md for the full transcript).

fields.name: taxpayerPersonalIdentityNumber
fields.label: Personal identity number (personnummer)
fields.description: Swedish personnummer, either 10-digit (YYMMDD-XXXX) or 12-digit (YYYYMMDD-XXXX) form. Not itself enumerated on Skatteverket's own numbered-box 'contents' page (see VERIFICATION.md); included because the return is personalized and addressed to a specific taxpayer's personnummer.
fields.sourceRef: Skatteverket general guidance on personalized, pre-printed individual tax returns; not confirmed against a specimen image of SKV 2000's own header

fields.name: taxpayerName
fields.label: Name
fields.description: Pre-printed by Skatteverket from the population register; not itself enumerated on Skatteverket's own numbered-box 'contents' page (see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: Skatteverket general guidance on personalized, pre-printed individual tax returns; not confirmed against a specimen image of SKV 2000's own header

fields.name: taxpayerAddress
fields.label: Address
fields.description: The registered address the return is mailed to. Not itself enumerated on Skatteverket's own numbered-box 'contents' page (see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: Skatteverket general guidance ('Tax returns are sent to your registered address'); not confirmed against a specimen image of SKV 2000's own header

fields.name: salariesBenefitsSicknessBenefits
fields.label: Salaries, benefits, sickness benefits etc.
fields.description: Pre-printed by Skatteverket as the sum of amounts reported to it by employers and other payers (e.g. salary, sickness benefit, other benefits); verified/corrected by the filer.
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §1.1 'Lön, förmåner, sjukpenning m.m.' / 'Salaries, benefits, sickness benefits etc.'

fields.name: compensationForExpenses
fields.label: Compensation for expenses
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §1.2 'Kostnadsersättning' / 'Compensation for expenses'

fields.name: nationalRetirementAndOccupationalPension
fields.label: National retirement pension and occupational pension etc.
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §1.3 'Allmän pension och tjänstepension' / 'National retirement pension and occupational pension etc.'

fields.name: privatePensionAndAnnuity
fields.label: Private pension and annuity
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §1.4 'Privat pension och livränta' / 'Private pension and annuity'

fields.name: otherNonPensionableIncome
fields.label: Other non-pensionable income
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §1.5 'Andra inkomster som inte är pensionsgrundande' / 'Other non pensionable income'

fields.name: hobbyOrOtherSelfEmployedIncome
fields.label: Income (e.g. hobby activities) on which you must pay your own individual social security contributions
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §1.6 'Inkomster, till exempel hobby, som du ska betala egenavgifter för' / 'Incomes, e.g. on hobby activities, on which you must pay your own individual social security contributions'

fields.name: incomeFromAnnexesK10K10AK13
fields.label: Income in accordance with annexe K10, K10A and K13
fields.description: Aggregate amount carried in from separate K10/K10A/K13 annexes (qualified-shares-in-close-companies computations), which are not themselves modelled here.
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §1.7 'Inkomst från bilaga K10, K10 A och K13' / 'Income in accordance with annexe K10, K10A and K13'

fields.name: journeysToAndFromWork
fields.label: Journeys to and from work
fields.description: Total amount of travel costs to/from work; a deduction is only given for the part exceeding SEK 11,000 (the filer fills in the total amount, not the already-reduced deduction).
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §2.1 'Resor till och från arbetet' / 'Journeys to and from work. You can only claim a deduction for the amount exceeding SEK 11,000. Fill in the total amount.'

fields.name: businessTrips
fields.label: Business trips
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §2.2 'Tjänsteresor' / 'Business trips'

fields.name: temporaryWorkDualResidenceAndJourneysHome
fields.label: Temporary work, dual residence and journeys home
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §2.3 'Tillfälligt arbete, dubbel bosättning och hemresor' / 'Temporary work, dual residence and journeys home'

fields.name: otherWorkRelatedExpenses
fields.label: Other work-related expenses
fields.description: Total amount of other work-related expenses; a deduction is only given for the part exceeding SEK 5,000 (the filer fills in the total amount, not the already-reduced deduction).
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §2.4 'Övriga utgifter för ditt arbete' / 'Other work-related expenses. You may only deduct the part exceeding SEK 5,000. Fill in the total amount.'

fields.name: socialInsuranceChargesEuRegulation
fields.label: Social insurance charges according to the EU Regulation etc.
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §3.1 'Socialförsäkringsutgifter enligt EU förordningen med mera' / 'Social insurance charges according to the EU Regulation etc.'

fields.name: rotWork
fields.label: "ROT" work (repairs, modification and extension)
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §4.1 'Rotarbete' / '"ROT" work (repairs, modification and extension)'

fields.name: rutWork
fields.label: "RUT" work (cleaning, maintenance and laundry)
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §4.2 'Rutarbete' / '"RUT" work (cleaning, maintenance and laundry)'

fields.name: renewableElectricity
fields.label: Renewable electricity
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §4.3 'Förnybar el' / 'Renewable electricity'

fields.name: donations
fields.label: Donations
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §4.4 'Gåva' / 'Donations'

fields.name: sustainableTechnologyInstallation
fields.label: Installation of sustainable technology
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §4.5 'Installation av grön teknik' / 'Installation of sustainable technology'

fields.name: propertyChargeBasisHouses
fields.label: Houses/owner-occupied apartments, property charge basis (0.75%)
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §5 'Småhus / Ägarlägenhet 0,75 %' / 'Houses/owner-occupied apartments 0.75%'

fields.name: propertyTaxBasisHousesUndevelopedPlots
fields.label: Houses/owner-occupied apartments, undeveloped plots, building under construction, property tax basis (1.0%)
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §6 'Småhus/ägarlägenhet, tomtmark, byggnad under uppförande 1,0 %' / 'Houses/owner-occupied apartments: undeveloped plots of land, building under construction 1.0%'

fields.name: standardRateOfCapitalIncome
fields.label: Standard rate of capital income (schablonintäkt)
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §7.1 'Schablonintäkt' / 'Standard rate of capital income'

fields.name: interestDividendsProfitK4SectionC
fields.label: Interest incomes, dividends, profit in accordance with Enclosure K4 Section C etc.
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §7.2 'Ränteinkomster, utdelningar, vinst från bilaga K4 avsnitt C m.m.' / 'Interest incomes, dividends, profit in accordance with Enclosure K4 Section C etc.'

fields.name: surplusFromRentalOfPrivateHousing
fields.label: Surplus from rental of private housing
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §7.3 'Överskott vid uthyrning av privatbostad' / 'Surplus from rental of private housing'

fields.name: profitOnInvestmentFundShares
fields.label: Profit on shares in investment funds etc. (annexes K4 A/B, K9 B, K10, K10A, K11, K12 B, K13)
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §7.4 'Vinst fondandelar, Vinst från bilaga K4 avsnitt A och B, K9 avsnitt B, K10, K10 A, K11, K12 avsnitt b och K13' / 'Profit on shares in investment funds, etc.'

fields.name: profitFromUnlistedInvestmentFundShares
fields.label: Profit from unlisted shares in investment funds etc. (annexes K4 D, K9 B, K12 C, K15A/B)
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §7.5 'Vinst ej marknadsnoterade fondandelar' / 'Profit from unlisted shares in investment funds etc.'

fields.name: profitK5K6ReversedDeferralK2
fields.label: Profit in accordance with Enclosure K5 and K6; reversed deferral from annexe K2
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §7.6 'Vinst från bilaga K5 och K6. Återfört uppskov från bilaga K2' / 'Profit in accordance with Enclosure K5 and K6. Reversed deferral from annexe K2.'

fields.name: profitK7K8
fields.label: Profit in accordance with annexes K7 and K8
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §7.7 'Vinst från bilaga K7 och K8' / 'Profit in accordance with annexes K7 and K8'

fields.name: interestExpensesLossK4SectionC
fields.label: Interest expenses etc.; loss in accordance with annexe K4 (Section C) etc.
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §8.1 'Ränteutgifter m.m. Förlust från bilaga K4 avsnitt C' / 'Interest expenses, etc. Loss in accordance with annexe K4 (Section C) etc.'

fields.name: lossOnInvestmentFundShares
fields.label: Loss on shares in investment funds etc. (annexes K4 A, K9 B, K10, K12 B, K13)
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §8.3 'Förlust fondandelar m.m.' / 'Loss on shares in investment funds, etc.'

fields.name: lossOnUnlistedInvestmentFundShares
fields.label: Loss on unlisted shares in investment funds (annexes K4 D, K9 B, K10A, K12 C, K15A/B)
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §8.4 'Förlust ej marknadsnoterade andelar' / 'Loss unlisted shares in investment funds.'

fields.name: lossK5K6
fields.label: Loss in accordance with annexes K5 and K6
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §8.5 'Förlust enligt bilaga K5/K6' / 'Loss in accordance with annexes K5 and K6'

fields.name: lossK7K8
fields.label: Loss in accordance with annexes K7 and K8
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §8.6 'Förlust enligt bilaga K7 och K8' / 'Loss in accordance with annexes K7 and K8'

fields.name: investorsDeductionK11
fields.label: Investors' deduction from annexe K11
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §8.7 'Investeraravdrag från bilaga K11' / 'Investors deductions from annexe K11'

fields.name: interestExpensesUnsecuredLoans
fields.label: Interest expenses on unsecured loans
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §8.8 'Ränteutgifter för lån utan säkerhet' / 'Interest expenses on unsecured loans'

fields.name: taxBaseEndowmentPolicyOrPepp
fields.label: Tax base for endowment policies/capital insurance or PEPPs
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §9.1 'Skatteunderlag för kapitalförsäkring och Pepp-produkter' / 'Tax base for endowment policies/capital insurance or PEPPs'

fields.name: taxBasePensionInsurance
fields.label: Tax base for endowment policies/pension insurance
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §9.2 'Skatteunderlag för pensionsförsäkring' / 'Tax base for endowment policies/pension insurance'

fields.name: hasForeignIncome
fields.label: Have you received income from abroad?
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §17 'Kryssa här om du har haft utländsk inkomst' / 'Put an X in this box if you have received income from abroad'

fields.name: foreignIncomeCategory
fields.label: Category of foreign income
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §17: 'Arbete' / 'Work', 'Pension' / 'Pension', 'Kapital' / 'Capital'

fields.name: foreignIncomeCountry
fields.label: Country from which the income was received
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §17 'Land som inkomsten kommer från' / 'The country from which the income was received'

fields.name: foreignIncomeAmountSek
fields.label: Amount in SEK (foreign income)
fields.description: If the foreign income is taxable in Sweden, it must also be added to the relevant box for its income category on page one (per the form's own instructions), which this document does not automate.
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §17 'Belopp i SEK' / 'Amount in SEK'

fields.name: foreignTaxSettlementAmountSek
fields.label: Settlement of foreign tax, amount in SEK
fields.description: Only entered if requesting a new deduction to offset foreign tax; the form's own instructions say not to fill this in if a deduction has already been granted.
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §17 'Avräkning utländsk skatt' / 'Settlement of foreign tax: If you wish to request a deduction to offset foreign tax, enter the amount here (if you have already been granted a deduction, you must not fill in the amount...)'

fields.name: requestsRotRutReallocation
fields.label: Requests reallocation of ROT/RUT/sustainable-technology tax reduction
fields.description: Detail on the amount, direction (to/from), and counterparty personal identity number is provided in the free-text otherInformation field, per the form's own instructions.
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §17 'Kryssa här om du begär omfördelning av skattereduktion för rot/rutarbete eller installation av grön teknik' / 'Put an X in this box if you wish to request reallocation of a tax reduction for ROT... and RUT... work, or installation of sustainable technology'

fields.name: incomeDataIncorrectOrMissing
fields.label: Income details are incorrect or missing
fields.description: Detail on the payer's name, address, compensation amount, and tax deductions is provided in the free-text otherInformation field, per the form's own instructions.
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §17 'Kryssa här om någon inkomstuppgift är felaktig/saknas' / 'Put an x in this box if any income details are incorrect or missing'

fields.name: otherInformation
fields.label: Other information
fields.description: Free-text field for information not otherwise captured on the form, e.g. accumulated income; the form's own instructions say attachments sent by post or submitted digitally do not need to be mentioned here.
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §17 'Övrigt' / 'Other information'

fields.name: signatureEmail
fields.label: E-mail address
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §18 'Namnteckning, e-postadress, telefonnummer' / 'Signature, e-mail address and telephone number'

fields.name: signatureTelephone
fields.label: Telephone number
fields.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §18 'Namnteckning, e-postadress, telefonnummer' / 'Signature, e-mail address and telephone number'

documents.label: Taxpayer's handwritten signature
documents.statement: By signing, the taxpayer submits the paper tax return to Skatteverket (an alternative to digital filing via e-identification, SMS, or phone approval, none of which require a handwritten signature).
documents.sourceRef: SKV 2000 §18 'Namnteckning, e-postadress, telefonnummer' / 'Signature, e-mail address and telephone number'

steps.title: General deductions and basis for tax reductions
Basis for property charge and property tax
